title: Aokiji Leaves the Crew Shaken — Part 5
description: After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Chopper, Luffy, Nami, Nico Robin, Aokiji. After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: that all of that is finally over...

summary: After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.
